RESOURCE_VIEW_CACHE_TTL.description: TTL in seconds for the view-result cache in apply_view(). 0 disables caching.

DUCKDB_JOB_DIR.description: Directory for transient per-job DuckDB files created by BaseChunkedDuckDBJob. Default is sibling of QUERY_SPOOL_DIR default (tmp/query_spool/../duckdb_jobs = tmp/duckdb_jobs). Use an absolute path on a named volume in Docker. Must not overlap with QUERY_SPOOL_DIR. Added by unified-query-core-infra.

EAP_ALARM_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag enabling the unified EapAlarmJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob). When 'on'/'true'/'1', the eap_alarm route enqueues via enqueue_query_job + EapAlarmJob with always-async 503 decision tree (sync_fallback_allowed=False). When 'off'/'false'/'0' (default), the legacy run_eap_alarm_query_job path is used unchanged (AC-8 zero-regression). Added by eap-alarm-unified-job-poc.
